settings.heroHeadline: Cinematic content, music production, branding, design, websites, workshops, and studio experiences.
settings.heroSubheadline: We help artists, entrepreneurs, brands, educators, wellness leaders, and creative teams produce professional content, build their visual identity, record music, design websites, create graphics, and learn the skills to keep growing their vision.
settings.footerCopy: Green Fire Media Hub. All rights reserved.

howItWorksSteps.title: Book & Plan
howItWorksSteps.description: Tell us your vision, timeline, and goals. We match you to the right package or studio session.

howItWorksSteps.title: Create
howItWorksSteps.description: Record, shoot, design, and produce in our studio or on location — including Utah Bolt cinematic production.

howItWorksSteps.title: Polish
howItWorksSteps.description: Editing, color, sound, graphics, and web assets shaped for your brand and platforms.

howItWorksSteps.title: Launch
howItWorksSteps.description: Deliverables ready for release, campaigns, social, and growth — with optional workshops to keep building.

home.bottomCtaText: Book a package, studio session, workshop, or Utah Bolt cinematic production. The deeper Green Fire community vision lives under Program.

packages.headline: Media packages built for your project
packages.subheadline: Custom-quoted packages for branding, music, content, and full creative launches. Every project is scoped to your goals, timeline, and deliverables.

cinematic.headline: Premium cinematic content production
cinematic.cinematicIntro: For brands, artists, products, businesses, and campaigns that need high-end cinematic visuals, Green Fire Media Hub offers premium production packages through our Utah-based cinematic studio setup.
cinematic.boltAdvantage: The Bolt system allows for precise, repeatable, high-speed camera moves that create clean, controlled, and eye-catching shots. This is ideal for product shots, music visuals, cinematic brand content, slow-motion movement, performance footage, and high-end social ads.

studio.headline: Use the Green Fire Media Studio
studio.intro: Green Fire Media Hub offers creative studio sessions for recording, filming, content creation, music production, lessons, and project development.

workshops.headline: Learn the Skills While Building the Project
workshops.intro: Everything offered through Green Fire Media Hub can also be taught through private lessons, group workshops, or guided project sessions.

utahBolt.headline: High-End Robot Arm Production in Utah
utahBolt.intro: The Bolt robot arm and cinematic studio setup are located in Utah. Clients can travel to the Utah studio to create professional cinematic content using advanced camera movement, lighting, slow motion, and motion-controlled shots.
utahBolt.travelNote: Travel can be built into custom packages when needed. Final pricing may include production time, setup, travel, lodging, gear transport, and any additional shoot requirements.

program.headline: What Is Green Fire Media Hub?
introParagraphs: Green Fire Media Hub is a creative media, music, technology, and education program built to help people bring meaningful projects into the world.

The original vision of Green Fire was a larger community research and innovation center — a place where art, media, wellness, technology, music, and education could come together to solve problems and create culture. That deeper mission still lives here.

Now, Green Fire Media Hub is the front-facing creative branch of that vision: a place where artists, brands, businesses, educators, and community projects can get professional media support, book studio time, learn creative skills, and build real-world projects.
closingLines: Green Fire is for people building something with heart.
It is for the artist with a message. The business with a story. The teacher with a workshop. The musician with a release. The founder with a vision. The community project that needs to be seen.
We help turn ideas into media, media into momentum, and momentum into something real.

accordionSections.title: The Original Vision & Methodology
accordionSections.content: Gather the people. Name the problem. Build the solution. Share the model. Green Fire operates as a rapid-response innovation engine — physically building working solutions and using high-end media to turn localized projects into open-source models or creator-led businesses.

accordionSections.title: The Four Sectors
accordionSections.content: Innovation Lab, Media Hub, Creative Studio, and Wellness & Resilience — each sector stands alone but together forms a complete engine for culture, education, healing, invention, and public storytelling.

accordionSections.title: What the Program Delivers
accordionSections.content: Regenerative infrastructure, documentaries & media, open-source blueprints, workshops & education, media production services, and prototyping & incubation.

accordionSections.title: How to Join / Support / Collaborate
accordionSections.content: Green Fire grows through council participation, volunteer contribution, project teams, workshops, media storytelling, and founding support.

program.deepDiveSubtitle: The full Green Fire operating system — community intake, council model, hubs, materials, economic engine, and impact framework.

contact.headline: Ready to Build?
contact.intro: Tell us what you are creating and what kind of support you need.
bookingOptions: A Utah Bolt robot production session
contact.pricingNote: Every project is quoted based on scope, production needs, editing time, travel, location, equipment, and final deliverables. Cinematic Bolt robot productions begin at $3,500 and are based in Utah.
